description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/josm/docker-library/openjdk:8 image, with a global before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the current directory’s .gradle folder and enables Gradle caching, a cache on .gradle/caches/build-cache-*, and include the Security/Dependency-Scanning.gitlab-ci.yml template. In the build stage add an assemble job that runs ./gradlew --stacktrace assemble and publishes the build/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that needs assemble, runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y firefox-esr then ./gradlew --stacktrace :build, and stores build/ as an artifact together with JUnit reports from i18n/build/test-results/jvmTest/TEST-*.xml and plugin/build/test-results/**/TEST-*.xml. In the deploy stage add four jobs: a "publish to / GitLab.com Maven" job that needs test, runs ./gradlew publishAllPublicationsToGitlabRepository and ./gradlew releaseToGitlab, and runs only on tags of the JOSM/gradle-josm-plugin project; a "publish to / Gradle Plugin Portal" job that needs test, runs ./gradlew -Pgradle.publish.secret="$GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET" -Pgradle.publish.key="$GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY" publishPlugins, requires the GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY and GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET variables and runs only on tags; a "publish to / OSS Sonatype Staging" job that needs test, runs ./gradlew publishAllPublicationsToOssSonatypeStagingRepository, requires SONATYPE_USERNAME and SONATYPE_PASSWORD variables and runs only on tags; and a "publish to / pages branch" job that needs test, runs only on tags, and executes a series of scripts to set up SSH keys, clone the pages branch, compute version strings, move Maven and KDoc artifacts, run ./gradlew publishAllPublicationsToBuildDirRepository dokkaHtmlMultimodule, update git references, commit with a message containing $longVersion, and push to the pages branch. Each deploy job defines an environment with a name and URL matching its target repository.
